ops.body: Fixed in commit 1685628 (KeyCache.heal calls evictStale(keep) keyed on the installed wrapper: drops only stale identity-wrapped entries, spares a concurrent different-endpoint Put, and a racing Close cannot revert the eviction target). Released in cookiesync v0.11.1. Tests: TestHealEvictionSparesCurrentWrapperEntry + TestEvictStaleUsesInstalledWrapperNotLiveInner (mutation-verified).
